idea-plugin.name: AI Inline Review
idea-plugin.description:
AI Inline Review brings human-curated, GitHub-style review comments into the editor and hands them to your coding agent.

  • Attach review notes to lines in the editor or diff view, with threaded replies, author chips and per-note Comment / Action modes.
  • Notes are written to plain JSON files in your project (.claude/review/inbox); your agent reads them, replies in-thread and (for Action notes) implements the change.
  • Plan / Code review sessions, context-free session notes, and a web-review mode that captures an annotated screenshot of any page into a note.

Ships an optional skill for Claude Code to drive the loop, but the review tooling itself is agent-agnostic.

Unofficial. Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Anthropic. "Claude" is a trademark of Anthropic; it is referenced only to describe interoperability.
idea-plugin.change-notes: • 0.1.0 — Initial release: inline review cards, threaded replies, Comment/Action modes, Plan/Code sessions, context-free notes, web-review screenshot capture, and an optional Claude Code skill.

action.description: Attach a review comment to the selected lines
